actual_title: Data Pipelines and Algorithmic Workflow Design

cards.title: Contracts, Validation, and Lineage
cards.governance_note: Define source inventories, input/output contracts, validation gates, lineage fields, and rejected-record logs.

cards.title: Dependencies, Orchestration, and Idempotence
cards.governance_note: Review dependency graphs, execution order, retries, checkpoints, atomic writes, and rerun safety.

cards.title: Monitoring, Governance, and Reproducibility
cards.governance_note: Audit monitoring signals, freshness, schema drift, public release gates, run metadata, and reproducible outputs.
